scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/modules/auth/auth.token.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/auth/auth.refresh.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/auth/auth.logout.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/auth/auth.service.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/auth/refresh-token.repository.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/auth/auth-audit.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/health/health.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/health/drizzle-health.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/settings/settings.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/settings/settings-ai.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/settings/settings.service.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/settings/settings.provider.int.spec.js && node dist/modules/settings/ollama-models.int.spec.js
scripts.test:coverage:auth: npm run build && node --test --test-isolation=none --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=dist/modules/auth/auth.service.js --test-coverage-include=dist/modules/auth/refresh-token.repository.js --test-coverage-include=dist/modules/auth/auth-rate-limit.service.js --test-coverage-exclude=dist/modules/auth/*.spec.js --test-coverage-lines=90 --test-coverage-branches=90 --test-coverage-functions=90 dist/modules/auth/auth.token.int.spec.js dist/modules/auth/auth.refresh.int.spec.js dist/modules/auth/auth.logout.int.spec.js dist/modules/auth/auth.service.int.spec.js dist/modules/auth/refresh-token.repository.int.spec.js dist/modules/auth/auth-audit.int.spec.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:auth && npm run test:coverage:health && npm run test:coverage:settings
